title: Traveling in 2021: Be smart and safe on the road
summary: Even as vaccines begin to roll out, coronavirus cases are spiking. But so is cabin fever, and it will only get worse as spring approaches, with the dark season giving slowly beginning to yield to the midnight sun. Cover photo: Denali Park Road in Denali National Park and Preserve, Alaska. (Photo: Flickr Creative Commons, Pontla) Traveling in 2021: Be smart and safe on the road By Molly Barnes, Digital Nomad Life Even as vaccines begin to roll out, coronavirus cases are spiking.
